channel.title: Forensic Evaluation on Zuluhotel Omega

item.title: Forensic Evaluation
item.description:
Forensic evaluation is used on corpses to find out the killer, looter, skinner and if skill is high enough even the time of death.

Forensic evaluation is a “free” skill for rangers and won’t count towards their spec or offspec skill count.
